title: Rural Health Concerns: MedlinePlus
text:
agencies working with their communities to promote healthy living. They can provide wellness and exercise classes and start a farmer's market. 
Local governments adding bike lanes and trails to encourage people to bike and walk. 
Rural schools can offer counseling and mental health services for their students.
